meta.source: Cloudflare D1 preparation bundle for Vercel + Supabase
notes: Inventory is initialized to 0 because live cross-device stock snapshots are not stored in this repo dump.
Templates and shop settings are included so a fresh Supabase environment starts with the same UI defaults.
